name: AdvancedPromptInjectionGuardrailByWSO2
displayName: Advanced Prompt Injection Guardrail by WSO2
description: Validates the request content using an advanced prompt injection detection model powered by WSO2 guardrails. If the detected prompt injection attempt score is higher than the allowed threshold, the guardrail intervenes and returns an error response.

policyAttributes.name: name
policyAttributes.description: The name of the guardrail policy. This will be used for tracking purposes.

policyAttributes.name: threshold
policyAttributes.description: The threshold that must be met for intervention.

policyAttributes.name: jsonPath
policyAttributes.description: The JSONPath expression used to extract content from the payload. If not specified, the entire payload will be used for validation.

policyAttributes.name: passthroughOnError
policyAttributes.description: If enabled, the request is passed through without validation when the prompt injection detection service is unavailable. Otherwise, a guardrail validation error is triggered.

policyAttributes.name: showAssessment
policyAttributes.description: When enabled, the error response will include detailed information about the reason for the guardrail intervention.
